name: Quick 'n Chewy Cresent Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 can Sweetened condensed milk (14 oz, not evaporated)
recipeInstructions: Heat oven to 400 degrees. In a medium bowl, combine flour, coconut, brown sugar, and pecans. Using a pastry blender or fork, cut in margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Set aside. Unroll dough into two long rectangles. Place in an ungreased 15x10x1-inch baking pan. Firmly press perforations to seal. Pour condensed milk evenly over dough within 1/2 inch of edges. Sprinkle coconut mixture over condensed milk; press in lightly. Bake at 400 degrees for 12 to 15 minutes or until deep golden brown. Cool. Cut into bars.
